title: Define company positions
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to define multiple job positions for my company, so that our organizational roles are represented accurately in the system.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am an authenticated Company/HR Admin, when I create a new position, then it is saved and available for use within my company.; Given my company already has positions, when I add another one, then multiple positions can coexist without limit imposed by the system.; Given a position exists, when I view the position list, then all defined positions for the company are shown.

title: Assign each position to exactly one department
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want each position to belong to exactly one department, so that positions are correctly organized within the company structure.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am creating or editing a position, when I save it, then it must be associated with exactly one department.; Given a position is being created, when no department is selected, then the system prevents the position from being saved.; Given a position is assigned to a department, when I attempt to assign it to a second department, then the system does not allow more than one department per position.
source: FR 6.8.1 (each position belongs to exactly one department)

title: Assign a position to an employee
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want to assign one position to each employee, so that every employee's role in the organization is clearly identified.
acceptance_criteria: Given an employee record, when I assign a position, then exactly one position is recorded for that employee.; Given an employee already has a position, when I assign a new position, then the previous assignment is replaced so the employee still holds only one position.; Given a position is assigned, when I view the employee's profile, then the assigned position is displayed.

title: Use positions in recruitment and onboarding
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want positions to be usable in recruitment and onboarding, so that hiring and new-hire setup reference standardized organizational roles.
acceptance_criteria: Given defined positions exist, when a recruitment requisition or job is created, then a company position can be selected for it.; Given a candidate is being onboarded, when the onboarding process runs, then the target position can be referenced.

title: Use positions in reporting and organizational setup
user_story: As a Company/HR Admin, I want positions to be available for reporting and organizational setup, so that I can analyze and structure the workforce by role.
acceptance_criteria: Given positions are assigned to employees, when I generate organizational reports, then data can be grouped or filtered by position.; Given the organizational structure is being configured, when I set it up, then positions can be used as part of that structure.
source: FR 6.8.3 (positions support reporting and organizational setup)

title: Scope positions to a single company
user_story: As a Group Company Admin, I want positions to be company-specific, so that each company's roles remain isolated within its own tenant context.
acceptance_criteria: Given positions are defined for a company, when another company is viewed, then it does not see or use the first company's positions.; Given a position is created, when it is saved, then it is scoped to the company that created it.
source: FR 6.8 Purpose (company-specific job positions within departments)
